name: WATTS WATER TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: PART I . In this Annual Report on Form10-K, references to the Company, Watts Water, Watts, we, us or our refer to Watts Water Technologies,Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. Overview Watts RegulatorCo. was founded by Joseph E. Watts in 1874 in Lawrence, Massachusetts. Watts RegulatorCo. started as a small machine shop supplying parts to the New England textile mills of the 19th century. Since then, Watts has grown into a global manufacturer and become one of the worlds leading providers of ...
